name: ageism_and_age_discrimination
description: Captures attitudes and beliefs about discrimination, stereotyping, and unequal treatment of older adults in social, employment, and media contexts. Reflects internalized ageist beliefs as well as perceived structural discrimination.

name: elder_abuse_awareness
description: Measures awareness, recognition, and personal exposure to various forms of abuse against older adults, including physical, psychological neglect, and age-based mistreatment. Reflects both normative beliefs about what constitutes abuse and direct knowledge of abusive situations.

name: state_and_family_responsibility_for_elder_care
description: Measures beliefs about who bears primary responsibility for the care and wellbeing of older adults, distinguishing between state/institutional obligations and family-based obligations. Relevant to welfare state attitudes and intergenerational solidarity norms.

name: perceived_quality_of_life_and_social_inclusion_of_older_adults
description: Captures perceptions of the overall living conditions, dignity, social consideration, and public policy adequacy for older adults in Mexico, including assessments of past trends and future expectations. Reflects a broader evaluative orientation toward aging as a social problem.

name: intergenerational_contact_and_family_integration
description: Measures the degree to which older adults are integrated into family life and decision-making, including frequency of contact, inclusion in household decisions, and the physical and social proximity between generations.
